selected_location: Born and raised in Brooklyn, New York
selected_snippet: Joseph Glass Award-Winning Indie Author Reading is a passion. Writing is an obsession. ​ Born and raised in Brooklyn, New York, I now reside and write in Milan, Italy. As an independent author, I invest in my writing
